## Description
<!-- Briefly describe the change and why it's needed -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's Kotlin coding style
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests for my change
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`./gradlew test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`./gradlew lint`)
- [ ] The change does **not** add internet permission, analytics, ads, or any form of data collection
- [ ] I have tested on a physical Android device (Android 10+)
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` with a summary of the change

## Testing
<!-- Describe how you tested this change. Include device model and Android version -->
